name: SearchResults
description: A search results page with a search bar, result cards, facet filters, and pagination. Ideal for search agents, knowledge bases, and retrieval-augmented generation UIs.

visual.description: Search bar at top with result count. Optional sidebar with facet filters (checkboxes). Main area shows result cards with title, snippet, source, and relevance score. Bottom pagination.
visual.layout: search bar + sidebar filters + result cards + pagination

props.name: results
props.description: Array of result objects with title, snippet, url, source, score

props.name: facets
props.description: Array of facet groups with name, options array (label, count, checked)
